/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ravex_jni.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libravex_jni.so -o libravex_jni.so CMakeFiles/ravex_jni.dir/jni_bridge.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/jvm/default/lib:/usr/lib/jvm/default/lib/server ../common/libravex_common.a ../hooks/antiafk/libravex_antiafk.a ../math/libravex_math.a ../hooks/shaders/libravex_shaders.a ../hooks/freecam/libravex_freecam.a /usr/lib/jvm/default/lib/libjawt.so /usr/lib/jvm/default/lib/server/libjvm.so /usr/lib/libSM.so /usr/lib/libICE.so /usr/lib/libX11.so /usr/lib/libXext.so -lXtst ../common/libravex_common.a
